---
theme-settings:
  theme: default
  barposition: top

survey-settings:
  mode: preview
  show-previous: false
  use-cookies: false
  auto-scroll: false
  rate-survey: false
  system-language: en
  highlight-unanswered: true
  highlight-color: blue
  capture-metadata: true
  all-required: false
---

```{r}
library(surveydown)
```

--- page1

# Preview Mode With Database Connection

This app passes a (fake) database connection object to `sd_server()` while
`mode: preview` is set. All responses must go to `preview_data.csv` and the
connection must never be used.

```{r}
sd_question(
  type  = 'mc',
  id    = 'fruit',
  label = "Favorite fruit?",
  option = c(
    'Apple'  = 'apple',
    'Banana' = 'banana'
  )
)
```

--- end

## End of the preview-with-db test survey.

```{r}
sd_close()
```
